name: Service Configured to Use Powershell
notes: This rule triggers when a service is configured to use Powershell.
conditions_text: when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
when the event category for the event is one of the following System.Service Installed, System.Successful Registry Modification
when any of Service Filename (custom), Registry Value Data (custom) match (?i).*powershell.*
TD_list: APPLY Service Configured to Use Powershell on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
AND when the event category for the event is one of the following System.Service Installed, System.Successful Registry Modification
AND when any of Service Filename (custom), Registry Value Data (custom) match (?i).*powershell.*
RED_list: Event name: Service Configured to Use Powershell observed
Event description: Detects when a service is configured to use powershell
Force the dispatched event to create a NEW offense, select the offense using Source IP
This information should contribute to the name of the associated offense(s)
